<!-- What are you trying to do that is hard or impossible today? -->

<!-- What should the API, MCP tool, CLI, or web UI do? Sketch the shape. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches and why they are worse. Fine to say "none". -->

## Who benefits

<!-- Which user types (anonymous, free, pro, enterprise; REST, MCP, web) gain from this? -->

## Additional context
